R0213.title: Edge Computing Node Attack
R0213.definition: Attackers compromise IoT edge computing nodes to steal locally processed sensitive data or tamper with AI inference results.

references.title: AIoT安全-边缘计算节点安全

R0213.description: Attackers compromise IoT edge computing nodes to steal locally processed sensitive data or tamper with AI inference results.
R0213.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
